title: Twitch star Nmplol breaks silence on divorce settlement with ex-wife Malena Tudi
summary_full: Twitch streamer Nmplol has disclosed details of his divorce settlement with ex-wife Malena Tudi. The court finalized their marriage under a no-fault insupportability ruling, with most assets split 50/50, though Malena received a larger share of Starforge Systems. Nmplol also revealed incurring over $400,000 in legal fees and expressed relief that the lengthy process is finally over.
